_note: 화풍별 글로벌 기본값. 캐릭터별 {id}_{style}.json의 style_prompt/negative_prompt가 이를 오버라이드함.

masako.label: 마사코 스타일
masako.base_style_prompt: masako style illustration, clean manga ink lines, soft screen tone shading, muted color palette, cinematic Korean drama composition, expressive emotional restraint, webtoon panel aesthetic
masako.negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, bright saturated colors, childish, chibi

real.label: 실사풍
real.base_style_prompt: photorealistic, Korean drama cinematography, 50mm lens shallow depth of field, natural cinematic lighting, realistic skin texture, cinematic restraint, Korean drama still cut
real.negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, painting, drawing, cgi, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra fingers, extra limbs, NSFW
